focus_points.label: Turning design leadership into org-level influence
focus_points.reason: Whether he’s translating his execution and team trust into sponsorship and hard-to-ignore stakeholder relationships at the org level.

focus_points.label: Decision ownership at the next level
focus_points.reason: What “good” looks like for a Lead in this growth plan is owning the decisions, not just driving the work—so you’ll want to get specific about which decisions he will be accountable for and how quickly he can unblock them.

focus_points.label: Cross-functional impact beyond the design team
focus_points.reason: Whether he’s getting enough clarity and alignment on who the decision-makers are across Product/Engineering and how design’s recommendations become tradeoffs that other teams actually adopt.

focus_points.label: What he’d want more of from you
focus_points.reason: If the growth contract is about decision ownership and cross-functional impact, you’ll want to name the specific sponsorship, introductions, and air cover he needs from you to take visible strategic positions without getting stuck in caution.
